productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so original anchor-11 carries 134 SPEED through a lifted mint release or 175 CARGO through a faster amber drive into original anchor-12 using existing release, tether, target, camera, HUD, effects, and synth owners; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.result: A surviving Emberplate wall through Siege 2 now unlocks one readable 5 crystal plus 3 energy specialist recipe; the existing build action deploys exactly one core-side Sentry, and wall-less failure restores the starter-wall recovery action.

lastCompletedUnit.result: A surviving Emberplate wall through Siege 2 now unlocks one readable 5 crystal plus 3 energy specialist recipe; the existing build action deploys exactly one core-side Sentry, and wall-less failure restores the starter-wall recovery action.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 22 existing Hellscape test entrypoints, affected JavaScript syntax, production JSON parsing, and diff hygiene passed. Playwright physically completed build, Siege 1, Grove/Ashes harvest, Emberplate forge, Siege 2, Crystal harvest/return, Sentry deployment, Siege 3 active fire, failure, rebuild, same-number retry, and Advanced closed/open/closed with zero console messages. Human View passed the first screen, pre-choice return, deployed/active Sentry, and failure recovery with diagnostics closed. Matched starting-commit performance measured 33.333 to 33.335 ms average frame time, 30.000 to 29.998 FPS, and 34.3 to 34.2 ms p95; 52 DOM nodes, one Canvas, 214 active descriptors, and zero long tasks remained bounded.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments production commit 453d76e4981b35aadf4988d91751045ab006c7c7 published to resolved default branch main after fetch-before-push verification; this repository commit records the publication receipt. ProtoKits remained unchanged and synchronized at 194d37714d7c23984970e09015b5dd4bffbbab7b.

exactNextUnit.goal: Make anchor-12 acknowledge 134 SPEED versus 175 CARGO through one branch-aware restore pulse and point the first generic swing toward anchor-13, reusing the existing restored event, route-choice score, recovery, camera, HUD, spark, and synth owners without another state or control.
